documentation: GitHub Copilot is an AI pair programmer that offers autocomplete-style suggestions as you code. It is integrated into IDEs like VS Code, Visual Studio, and JetBrains, using OpenAI models.
pricing: Individual is $10/month or $100/year. Business is $19/user/month. Enterprise is $39/user/month.
release_notes: Copilot Chat introduced context-aware workspace querying and inline slash commands for refactoring.
